title: Functions as Values, Signatures, and Composition · Effects Clinic: Function Composition
summary: Turn repeated validation branches into reusable transformations for an intake service. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp function composition increment in a typed composition library with signature evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compose compatible unary transformations and explain data flow across boundaries.
Model callable parameter and return relationships with precise type annotations.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
